name: GH_UpgradeUtil
summary: Exposes several utility functions for migrating parameters and wires between components useful while upgrading components.

constructors.name: GH_UpgradeUtil
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the GH_UpgradeUtil class

methods.name: MigrateInputParameters(IGH_Component, IGH_Component)
methods.signature: public static bool MigrateInputParameters(IGH_Component source, IGH_Component target)

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: MigrateInputParameters(IGH_Component, IGH_Component, Int32[], Int32[])
methods.signature: public static bool MigrateInputParameters(IGH_Component source, IGH_Component target, int[] index0, int[] index1)
methods.summary: Migrate a bunch of input parameters.

params.name: index0
params.doc: List of input indices to migrate.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: MigrateOutputParameters(IGH_Component, IGH_Component)
methods.signature: public static bool MigrateOutputParameters(IGH_Component source, IGH_Component target)

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: MigrateOutputParameters(IGH_Component, IGH_Component, Int32[], Int32[])
methods.signature: public static bool MigrateOutputParameters(IGH_Component source, IGH_Component target, int[] index0, int[] index1)
methods.summary: Migrate a bunch of output parameters.

params.name: index0
params.doc: List of output indices to migrate.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: MigrateRecipients(IEnumerable<IGH_Param>, IGH_Param)
methods.signature: public static int MigrateRecipients(IEnumerable<IGH_Param> recipients, IGH_Param target)
methods.summary: Utility method for bulk assigning a bunch of sources.

methods.name: MigrateRecipients(IGH_Param, IGH_Param)
methods.signature: public static int MigrateRecipients(IGH_Param from, IGH_Param to)
methods.summary: Migrate all recipients from A to B, while maintaining order.

methods.name: MigrateSources(IEnumerable<IGH_Param>, IGH_Param)
methods.signature: public static int MigrateSources(IEnumerable<IGH_Param> sources, IGH_Param target)
methods.summary: Utility method for bulk assigning a bunch of sources.

methods.name: MigrateSources(IGH_Param, IGH_Param)
methods.signature: public static int MigrateSources(IGH_Param from, IGH_Param to)
methods.summary: Migrate all sources from A to B, while maintaining order.

methods.name: ReplaceInputParameters
methods.signature: public static void ReplaceInputParameters(IGH_Component source, IGH_Component target)
methods.summary: Move all input parameters from one component to another. Only use this function if the target component can handle the input layout of the source component.

methods.name: ReplaceOutputParameters
methods.signature: public static void ReplaceOutputParameters(IGH_Component source, IGH_Component target)
methods.summary: Move all output parameters from one component to another. Only use this function if the target component can handle the output layout of the source component.

methods.name: SwapComponents(IGH_Component, IGH_Component)
methods.signature: public static bool SwapComponents(IGH_Component oldComponent, IGH_Component newComponent)
methods.summary: Replace an existing component with a different one. All parameters (input and output) will be migrated.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SwapComponents(IGH_Component, Guid)
methods.signature: public static IGH_Component SwapComponents(IGH_Component oldComponent, Guid newComponentGuid)
methods.summary: Replace an existing component with a different one. All parameters (input and output) will be migrated.

params.name: newComponentGuid
params.doc: ComponentGuid of the component to add.

methods.name: SwapComponents(IGH_Component, IGH_Component, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static bool SwapComponents(IGH_Component oldComponent, IGH_Component newComponent, bool migrateParameters)
methods.summary: Replace an existing component with a different one. All parameters (input and output) will be migrated.

params.name: migrateParameters
params.doc: If true, all parameters will be moved from old to new.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SwapComponents(IGH_Component, Guid, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static IGH_Component SwapComponents(IGH_Component oldComponent, Guid newComponentGuid, bool migrateParameters)
methods.summary: Replace an existing component with a different one. All parameters (input and output) will be migrated.

params.name: newComponentGuid
params.doc: ComponentGuid of the component to add.

params.name: migrateParameters
params.doc: If true, all parameters will be moved from old to new.
